title: setaria verticillata var. longiseta
intro: Setaria verticillata var. longiseta, also known as Spear Grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Spear Grass include relief from fever, digestive problems, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas or infusions, and its leaves and stems can be dried and used in various herbal preparations, including tinctures and decoctions.
